channel.title: コマンド on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in コマンド on Memo

item.title: File Compression (tar, zip, lzh, bz2)
item.description: File Compression (tar, zip, lzh, bz2) # Usage # Extension Compression Decompression zip zip -r output.zip dir unzip input.zip tar tar -cvf output.tar dir tar -xvf input.tar tar.gz tar -acvf output.tar.gz dir tar -xvf input.tar.gz tar.bz2 tar -acvf output.tar.bz2 dir tar -xvf input.tar.bz2 tar.xz tar -acvf output.tar.xz dir tar -xvf input.tar.xz lzh lha -c output.lzh dir lha -x input.lzh bz2 bzip2 -z input.file bzip2 -dk input.bz2 Meaning of options (tar) # Option Meaning -a –auto-compress -c –create -v –verbose -f –file=ARCHIVE -x –extract

item.title: nkf
item.description: nkf # Install # Arch paru -S nkf Ubuntu sudo apt install nkf Usage # To convert any file to UTF-8 + LF: nkf -w -Lu --overwrite input_file To convert C files in current directory to UTF-8 + LF: find . -iname "*.c" -type f -print0 | xargs -0 nkf -w -LF --overwrite

item.title: ffmpeg
item.description: ffmpeg # Install # Arch sudo pacman -S ffmpeg Ubuntu sudo apt install ffmpeg MP4 Manipulation with ffmpeg # Command Description ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -crf 30 output.mp4 Compression. The higher the crf value, the higher the compression ratio. ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -an output.mp4 Mute audio.

item.title: platformio
item.description: platformio # Install # PlatformIO is written in Python. You can install following command: pip3 install platformio Basic usage # You can use pio instead of platformio. Command Description pio boards [Query] You can see supported boards. pio init --board [ID] Initialize current directory. pio lib search [Query] Search library. pio lib show [Query] Show description of the library. pio lib install [ID or Name] Install library. pio lib uninstall [ID or Name] Uninstall library.

item.title: fwupd
item.description: fwupd # Install # Arch sudo pacman -S fwupd Ubuntu sudo apt install fwupd Usage # Refresh data from server: fwupdmgr refresh Check device for updates: fwupdmgr get-updates Update and install: fwupdmgr update Troubleshooting # If the update does not apply, follow the steps below. Download .cab file Install: fwupdmgr install [path-to-.cab]

item.title: find and grep
item.description: find and grep # Source Code Reading with find + grep # find . -type f \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' \) -print0 | xargs -0 grep -C 3 -Hni 'root_hpa'

item.title: dd
item.description: dd # Bootable USB # dd bs=4M if=/path/to/archlinux.iso of=/dev/sdx status=progress && sync
